lever: remove expansion-only distribute rewrite while retaining cost-reducing factor rewrite

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-profile-pass12 cargo bench -p fj-egraph --bench egraph_baseline -- --sample-size 40 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-bench-after-pass12 cargo bench -p fj-egraph --bench egraph_baseline -- egraph/optimize_aggressive_config --sample-size 40 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Equation ordering is fixed by the asserted optimized canonical fingerprint and the crate regression test.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: Extractor and OpCount tie-breaking are unchanged; this lever only removes an expansion rewrite from the aggressive rule list.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: The new golden test evaluates original and optimized programs for x=-2.0, 0.0, 2.0, 7.5, and existing overflow-boundary tests still pass.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state or stochastic primitive paths are touched.

validation.note: exit 0; existing warning inventory reported by UBS was not introduced by this lever
